creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The URL you are trying to use is not working for me.  Is this something
that you can address?  If not let me know and I will close this PR.

wxs@ack ...bsd/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop % make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> xscoop-1.0.2.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in
/home/wxs/freebsd/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from
ftp://ftp.datazygte.com/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/.
fetch:
ftp://ftp.datazygte.com/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/xscoop-1.0.2.tar.gz:
Connection refused
=> Attempting to fetch from
http://www.fourcalorieservers.com/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/.
xscoop-1.0.2.tar.gz                           100% of   89 kB   15 kBps
wxs@ack ...bsd/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop %

-- WXS
